Olo.description: Digital ordering and delivery platform for restaurant brands. Went private via Thoma Bravo take-private in July 2025.
Olo.financial_highlights: At time of take-private: FY2024 revenue $295M (+28% YoY), gross margin ~58%, GAAP net loss narrowing. Transaction value ~$2.0B equity, representing ~6.8x TTM revenue.

Thanx.description: Restaurant loyalty and digital guest engagement platform.
Thanx.financial_highlights: Raised $17M Series C in Sept 2022 led by I2BF Global Ventures. Total known funding ~$33M across 5 rounds. Revenue not publicly disclosed.

Deliverect.description: Delivery order management and integration platform for restaurants, headquartered in Belgium.
Deliverect.financial_highlights: Series D of $150M in Sept 2022 at $1.4B valuation (unicorn status). Led by Coatue with participation from DST Global, OMERS Ventures. Total known funding ~$240M.

TouchBistro.description: iPad POS and restaurant management platform.
TouchBistro.financial_highlights: Raised growth equity from Recognition Capital and existing investors. Total known funding ~$150M. Filed for IPO in 2021 (later withdrawn). Serves 29,000+ restaurants.

SpotOn.description: Restaurant and small business technology including POS, payments, and marketing.
SpotOn.financial_highlights: Raised $300M Series F in May 2022 at $3.15B valuation, led by G Squared. Total known funding $940M+. Has made multiple acquisitions (Appetize, Emagine POS).

Bikky.description: Restaurant customer data platform and analytics for enterprise chains.
Bikky.financial_highlights: Raised $7M Series A in June 2023 led by Craft Ventures. Total known funding ~$10M. Serves enterprise restaurant brands with CDP and analytics.

ItsaCheckmate.description: Restaurant online ordering aggregation and integration platform.
ItsaCheckmate.financial_highlights: Largely bootstrapped. Serves 20,000+ restaurant locations with delivery integrations. No major institutional rounds publicly disclosed.

Otter POS.description: Restaurant management platform with POS and order aggregation, built by Otter (ex-CloudKitchens).

latest_valuation.source: Bloomberg reporting on Otter parent valuation

Otter POS.financial_highlights: Raised $50M Series C in Feb 2024 at $1.1B valuation. Total known funding $80M+. Spun out from CloudKitchens.

Snackpass.description: Social commerce and mobile ordering platform for restaurants, popular on college campuses.
Snackpass.financial_highlights: Raised $70M Series B in Nov 2021 at $400M valuation, led by Craft Ventures. Total known funding ~$95M. Focused on college campus and QSR ordering.

Peppr POS.description: Modern point-of-sale system designed for restaurants.
Peppr POS.financial_highlights: Early-stage private company. Limited public financial disclosure.

Revi.description: Restaurant customer engagement and retention platform.

TalonOne.description: Promotion and loyalty engine API for enterprise brands, headquartered in Berlin.
TalonOne.financial_highlights: Series B of $10M in July 2021, led by Ecosystem Integrity Fund. Total known funding ~$20M. Serves enterprise retail and restaurant brands with a promotions API.

Sparkfly.description: Real-time offer management and loyalty redemption platform for restaurants.
Sparkfly.financial_highlights: Bootstrapped / limited institutional funding disclosed. Serves major QSR and restaurant brands with promotional offer infrastructure.

Tillster.description: Digital ordering, kiosk, and data analytics solutions for restaurant chains.
Tillster.financial_highlights: Acquired by Volaris Group (Constellation Software) in 2018. Serves 50+ major restaurant brands including Taco Bell, KFC, Subway, Burger King.

Paytronix.description: Loyalty, gift, and digital customer engagement platform for restaurants.
Paytronix.financial_highlights: Acquired by Great Hill Partners in 2017 for undisclosed amount. Serves 1,800+ restaurant brands with loyalty, gift cards, online ordering.

Hang.description: Next-gen restaurant loyalty and membership platform.
Hang.financial_highlights: Raised $16M Series A in April 2022 at $100M valuation, led by Paradigm. Total known funding ~$20M. Pivoted from NFT loyalty to broader membership infrastructure.

Spendgo.description: SaaS loyalty and retention marketing platform for restaurants. Acquired by Olo in December 2025.

latest_valuation.source: Olo press release / Restaurant Business reporting

Spendgo.financial_highlights: Acquired by Olo in December 2025 as Olo's first acquisition under Thoma Bravo ownership. Terms undisclosed. Powers the new Olo Loyalty product. Previously raised total funding of ~$7.9M (per PitchBook) across one disclosed Series round led by Branded Strategic Hospitality. Clients include Round Table Pizza, Jamba Juice, Dickey's Barbeque.
